purpose: Comprehensive reference for Electron app configuration via electron/settings.js. Documents the JSON-backed settings store (get/set/getAll/reset/init API), default settings (window geometry, behavior, performance polling, theme, project management), settings file location (OS-specific {userData}/synapse-settings.json), window state persistence with 500ms debounce, BrowserWindow configuration, custom app:// protocol with three-step path resolution, dev vs production loading modes, and Electron build/packaging configuration in package.json.
gotchas: Settings file location is OS-specific via app.getPath('userData')
Unknown keys are accepted with console warning -- store is not strictly schema-locked
Window state persistence is debounced 500ms; skipped when maximized
Build target is macOS DMG only
node_modules excluded from package -- bundled by build process
unset ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE in npm start ensures GUI mode
dangerouslySkipPermissions setting bypasses ALL safety confirmations -- use with caution
patterns: Cache-first read with DEFAULTS fallback for get()
Atomic write of full cache on every set()
Custom protocol resolution: direct path -> dist/ -> public/
Window restore: load geometry from settings, undefined for null x/y
conventions: All settings have defined defaults in DEFAULTS object
backgroundColor #0a0a0c matches CSS --bg to prevent white flash
contextIsolation true + nodeIntegration false for renderer security
preload.js exposes safe APIs via contextBridge
